response.justification: Wei Chen is a full-stack web and TypeScript/Node.js developer with a strong generalist background but critically lacks the two core requirements for this role: substantial C++ experience (only approximately 6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015, far short of the 5-10 years required) and any demonstrable capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain knowledge. The candidate's primary stack — TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB, React — is entirely misaligned with the Windows-platform C++ and SQL Server/Oracle stack demanded by the role.
strengths: CI/CD pipeline experience demonstrated across multiple roles (GitLab, Docker, trunk-based development)
Strong communication and knowledge-sharing track record through conference talks, workshops, and teaching
Java development background, listed as a desirable optional skill
concerns: C++ experience is negligible (~6 months, 2014-2015) versus the 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development required
Zero fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure
No evidence of SQL Server or Oracle proficiency; SQL skills appear limited to MySQL and general query work
